notes: Mines the AIDev dataset of real GitHub PRs (Python repos >500 stars) to compare AI-agent vs human PRs on code metrics, a novel semantic-redundancy pipeline (CodeSage embeddings + PyRef), and DistilRoBERTa sentiment analysis of reviewer comments. Includes a single-repo (crewAI) case study for the computationally intensive redundancy analysis and proposes/builds the MRS metric and detection pipeline (tool-build). Reviewer sentiment is inferred from archival comments, not solicited participants, so human_subjects=false.
